function[T0, T1] { forall(x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0, x2: (T1, T1) -> T1, x3: T0 -> T1) { not lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) or x0 != x3 or lib(relation_transport).preserves_binary_op[T0, T1](x3, x1, x2) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { (forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 } and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0)) = lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not (forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 } and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0)) or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not (forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 } and lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1)) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0) or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not (forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } and forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 }) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0) or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } or not forall(x3: T1) { x1(x0(x3)) = x3 } or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0) or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T0, T1](x1, x0) } }

function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder] { forall(x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { not forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x1) or not lib(order).is_order_embedding[T1, T0](x0) or exists(k0: T1) { x1(x0(k0)) != k0 } or lib(order_iso).is_order_iso_pair[T1, T0](x0, x1) } }
